infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Travel Buddy uses the camera to let you snap photos of receipts so they can be saved to your trip.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Travel Buddy accesses your photo library so you can attach existing receipt images and trip photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Travel Buddy saves generated trip photos and receipts back to your photo library when you choose to export them.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Travel Buddy uses your location to center the map on you and show nearby stops on your itinerary.
